name: instrumentality-vscode
description: Surfaces knowledge-base drift, conform-pending, promotions, and lint state from the kb-mcp server.

instrumentality.agent.backend.description: How 'Send Prompt' delivers the generated prompt. 'clipboard' copies it (you paste into the agent). 'terminal' types it into the active terminal. 'command' invokes a VS Code command id (set instrumentality.agent.commandId).

instrumentality.agent.commandId.description: VS Code command id to invoke when instrumentality.agent.backend is 'command'. The command receives the prompt string as its first argument. Example: 'workbench.action.terminal.sendSequence'.

instrumentality.notifications.enabled.description: Show toast notifications when sync state worsens (new errors, large delta, baseline change). Off by default — enable after you've tuned the rest.

instrumentality.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds. 0 = file-watch only (default). Set to 30+ for unreliable network filesystems.

instrumentality.lint.command.description: Override the lint command. Default tries '<kbRoot>/knowledge/_mcp/scripts/lint-standalone.js'. Set to e.g. 'npx kb-lint' or '/abs/path/to/lint-standalone.js' if your project uses an installed kb-mcp.

instrumentality.kbMcpPath.description: Override the kb-mcp install location for 'Publish Drift Queue'. Accepts either the kb-mcp repo root or a direct path to '.../knowledge/_mcp/tools'. Leave empty to fall back to $KB_MCP_HOME, the workspace, node_modules, or the bundled copy shipped with the extension.
